## Checklist

- [ ] Scope & Status table in `README.md` updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Evidence links in README Evidence Index resolve after this change
- [ ] New service functions documented in `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`
- [ ] `docs/` supplementary files updated if SOP or capacity guidance changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No credentials, API keys, or secrets committed
- [ ] No external network calls added (app must remain offline-capable)

## Preservation Notes (Documentation PRs only)

- [ ] No existing critical runbook or procedure text removed
- [ ] Legacy section names retained or re-added for continuity
- [ ] New guidance appended as additive sections or appendices
- [ ] Evidence links validated after edits
